pages.headline: Celtic 4-0 Kilmarnock
pages.caption: CEL 4-0 KIL
pages.explanation: Goal! Celtic 4, Kilmarnock 0. Arne Engels (Celtic) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.

pages.headline: Celtic 3-0 Kilmarnock
pages.caption: CEL 3-0 KIL
pages.explanation: Goal! Celtic 3, Kilmarnock 0. Daizen Maeda (Celtic) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Arne Engels with a through ball.

pages.headline: Celtic 2-0 Kilmarnock
pages.caption: CEL 2-0 KIL
pages.explanation: Goal! Celtic 2, Kilmarnock 0. Kieran Tierney (Celtic) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Liam Scales.

pages.headline: Celtic 1-0 Kilmarnock
pages.caption: CEL 1-0 KIL
pages.explanation: Goal! Celtic 1, Kilmarnock 0. Johnny Kenny (Celtic) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Reo Hatate.

pages.headline: Celtic 3-0 Kilmarnock
pages.caption: Penalty Won !!!
pages.explanation: Penalty Celtic. Yang Hyun-Jun draws a foul in the penalty area.

pages.headline: Celtic 2-0 Kilmarnock
pages.caption: Yellow Card
pages.explanation: Greg Kiltie (Kilmarnock) is shown the yellow card.

pages.caption: Yellow Card

pages.headline: Celtic 2-0 Kilmarnock

pages.headline: Celtic 2-0 Kilmarnock
pages.caption: Yellow Card

pages.headline: Celtic power to a convincing 4-0 win
pages.body: Celtic produced a strong and confident performance to defeat Kilmarnock 4-0 in the Scottish Premiership. Johnny Kenny opened the scoring early, Kieran Tierney added a superb second after the break, and Daizen Maeda made it three with a sharp finish late on. Arne Engels then capped the victory from the spot in stoppage time. It was an impressive, upbeat display full of control, attacking intent, and encouraging signs for the weeks ahead.
